title: maruta cotula
intro: Maruta cotula, commonly known as Cotula australis, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant is known for its traditional use in folk medicine, where it is believed to have various health benefits. The health benefits of Maruta cotula include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help in reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of this plant include sesquiterpene lactones, which are responsible for its therapeutic actions, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
